name: Pumpkin Butter
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can solid-pack pumpkin (NOT pumpkin pie mix)
recipeInstructions:
1/2 cup packed light brown sugar
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon ground ginger
1/8 teaspoon ground cinnamon
1/8 teaspoon ground allspice
About 4 hours before serving or a day ahead:
1. Grate the lemon to make 1 tablespoon; squeeze to make 1 tablespoon juice.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, combine lemon peel and juice with remaining ingredients. Bring to boiling.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for 30 minutes, stirring often.
4. Spoon pumpkin mixture into a shallow bowl; cover and refrigerate until well-chilled, at least 3 hours.
5. Serve with warm biscuits. Makes about 2 and 1/2 cups (Makes a nice Christmas gift!).
